<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\BloomFilter; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; use Predis\Command\Traits\BloomFilters\Capacity; use Predis\Command\Traits\BloomFilters\Error; use Predis\Command\Traits\BloomFilters\Expansion; use Predis\Command\Traits\BloomFilters\Items; use Predis\Command\Traits\BloomFilters\NoCreate; class BFINSERT extends RedisCommand { use Capacity { Capacity::setArguments as setCapacity; } use Error { Error::setArguments as setErrorRate; } use Expansion { Expansion::setArguments as setExpansion; } use Items { Items::setArguments as setItems; } use NoCreate { NoCreate::setArguments as setNoCreate; } protected static $capacityArgumentPositionOffset = 1; protected static $errorArgumentPositionOffset = 2; protected static $expansionArgumentPositionOffset = 3; protected static $noCreateArgumentPositionOffset = 4; protected static $itemsArgumentPositionOffset = 6; public function getId() { return 'BF.INSERT'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $this->setNoCreate($arguments); $arguments = $this->getArguments(); if (array_key_exists(5, $arguments) && $arguments[5]) { $arguments[5] = 'NONSCALING'; } $this->setItems($arguments); $arguments = $this->getArguments(); $this->setExpansion($arguments); $arguments = $this->getArguments(); $this->setErrorRate($arguments); $arguments = $this->getArguments(); $this->setCapacity($arguments); $this->filterArguments(); } }
